# Coding Plan for openclaw/openclaw#60237: [Feature]: Add threadPromptGuideline for customizable auto-generated Discord thread titles

Source report: [records/openclaw-openclaw/items/60237.md](records/openclaw-openclaw/items/60237.md)

## Summary

Keep open. Current main and the latest release still use a fixed Discord generated-title prompt, and the related merged generated-title PR did not add a per-channel prompt guideline field, schema/docs/runtime plumbing, or custom-guideline tests.

## Plan

Implement the requested Discord generated-thread-title customization for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/60237. Add a backwards-compatible per-channel config field, likely `threadPromptGuideline`, under Discord guild channel config for `autoThreadName: "generated"`; validate it as an optional string with a 500-character maximum; carry it through allow-list resolution into `maybeRenameDiscordAutoThread` and `generateThreadTitle`; append bounded operator guidance to the existing concise/title-only prompt contract rather than replacing all system instructions. Update TypeScript config types, strict zod schema, generated channel config metadata/help as required by repo tooling, Discord docs, focused tests, and a user-facing changelog entry if this repair is maintainer-owned. Do not change default behavior when the field is absent, do not broaden Discord permissions, and do not move Discord-owned behavior into core except for existing config contracts.
